AI Coding Agent 有没有 10x 提效没必要证明，证明也没多少意义，这就是个信仰，信则灵！

不相信的人，你怎么证明都没用
相信的人，在拼命压榨 AI 的潜能和摸索最佳实践，早已超过 10x
https://t.co/7QHZEi9sIk

I think this is a good way to visualize the AI race using the long-lived GPQA Diamond benchmark.

You can see how long OpenAI had the field to itself, the rise (and collapse) of Meta, the sudden catch-up (and then stagnation) of xAI, and the entry of open weights Chinese LLMs. https://t.co/lFXO4UCiVg

The Graduate-Level Google-Proof Q&A test (GPQA) is a series of hard multiple-choice problems designed to test advanced knowledge. Non-experts with access to the internet get 34% right, PhDs with internet access get 65-70% inside their specialty. We are probably near saturation

最近观察到的现象：

各行业各职业的个体被AI 赋能，十倍百倍放大之前的产出。

但同时，「上游」也在被放大。

起点问题重新冒了出来：

之前因为不可能自己把所有事情全做了，所有给「下游」让渡了一部分利润，形成了生态。

现在「AI 来了」，「反正是AI
